queen's decree, beyond death, tablet, Fouette could count so you have more "taunt" spells in a rotation (depend of your comp), memory of a winter, Rudder sail, heart of a knight if you use a tank with low cost cards

yeah suck is 30 hp / deck rotation, so Exile, Memory of winter or rudder sails are better anyway

get 3 leechers and just do breach over and over and over again
decided that was enough for me
like apparently from my checking, its like half exp at 98 vs at 97
and i assume its the same at 99
the time required ramps up to the moon

Same mood. Same poe experience. But in my case I lost my interest in poe coz it's pve for pve content. Get stronger to farm stronger mobs.  Without a pvp game loses a lot of interest for me. In Morimens as soon as I got all rewards I lost interest in pvp coz there is no goal. Ofc you can aim for being number 1 but without reward it means nothing for me
Pve is still okay though coz it takes literally 10 mins to get dailies plus another 15 to complete event stuff. More or less bearable
I got to 8/8 on all pinnacle bosses so that's enough hehe
